dashboard.journey_subtitle: Complete tasks, earn badges, and explore AI islands!
dashboard.help_desc: Contact us for curriculum mapping, DPA agreements, or bulk school licences at hello@youngaiexplorers.com

lesson.quiz_cta_desc: Show what you've learned and earn a new badge for your collection.
lesson.not_found_desc: We couldn't find the lesson you were looking for.

landing.hero_desc: Exploring the Future, One Idea at a Time. The ultimate educational ecosystem for the next generation of innovators.
landing.vee_add_anytime: Vision Vee can add more anytime
landing.book_companion_desc: Your trusted passport into AI literacy — the perfect offline companion to the unlimited platform.
landing.meet_vee_desc: Not just an AI. A friendly companion that answers questions, explains complex ideas with simple analogies, and creates new topics on demand — so there's no limit to what you can learn on Young AI Explorers.
landing.learning_journey_subtitle: Start with book lessons. Keep going with Vision Vee — forever.
landing.badges_desc: Unlock special achievements as you complete chapters and custom topics.
landing.leaderboard_desc: Compete with other explorers globally or in your region.

intro.title: Welcome to the Future
intro.desc: This is where every child starts. An exciting intro to tomorrow's tech.

1.title: Computer Vision
1.desc: Give cameras the power to recognize and label objects in the world.

2.title: Speech Recognition
2.desc: Translating spoken language into digital text.

3.title: AI Translation
3.desc: Build bridges of friendship by breaking down language barriers.

trust.title: Built for Governments. Trusted by Families.
trust.desc: Young AI Explorers is designed to meet the expectations of education ministries, high commissioners, and guardians worldwide — with enterprise-grade security and child-first privacy.
trust.leaders_desc: We welcome partnerships with departments of education, high commissioners, and school networks. Request a pilot programme, curriculum mapping document, or data processing agreement for institutional deployment.

community_dict.title: Young AI Explorers Worldwide
community_dict.desc: Choose your country at registration — or any nation worldwide. Connect with explorers, share ideas safely, and challenge friends to a Match Quiz. Live data from Supabase.
community_dict.no_trends: Complete a lesson to appear in your country's trends — real activity, no mock data.
